code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of Triple objects about an artist into a single fluent sentence.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Mapping from predicate to a readable phrase (verb + optional preposition)
    phrase_map = {
        "associatedBand/associatedMusicalArtist": "is associated with",
        "background": "has background",
        "birthDate": "was born on",
        "genre": "is known for the genre",
        "instrument": "plays",
        "origin": "originates from",
        "activeYearsStartYear": "started active years in",
        "birthPlace": "was born in",
        "birthYear": "was born in",
        "occupation": "works as",
        "recordLabel": "is signed to",
        "deathPlace": "died in",
        "alternativeName": "is also known as",
        "activeYearsEndYear": "ended active years in",
        "deathDate": "died on",
        "nationality": "is a",
        "professionalField": "works in",
        "musicFusionGenre": "fuses with",
        "musicSubgenre": "has subgenre",
        "stylisticOrigin": "originates stylistically from",
        "language": "speaks",
        "officialLanguage": "has official language",
        "derivative": "derives into",
        "location": "is located in",
        "governingBody": "is governed by",
        "leader": "is led by",
        "leaderTitle": "has leader title",
        "country": "is in",
        "ethnicGroup": "has ethnic group",
        "parentCompany": "is owned by",
        "bandMember": "has member",
        "capital": "has capital",
        "anthem": "has anthem",
        "currency": "uses currency",
        "demonym": "people are called",
        "isPartOf": "is part of",
        "distributingCompany": "is distributed by",
        "training": "trained at",
        "populationDensity": "has population density",
        "meaning": "means",
        "longName": "full name is",
        "areaTotal": "covers an area of",
        "foundingDate": "was founded on",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "has elevation of",
        "postalCode": "postal code is",
    }

    # Group triples by subject to build richer clauses
    from collections import defaultdict
    subject_map = defaultdict(list)
    for triple in triples:
        subject_map[triple.subject].append((triple.predicate, triple.object))

    subject_clauses = []
    for subject, pred_objs in subject_map.items():
        parts = []
        for pred, obj in pred_objs:
            phrase = phrase_map.get(pred)
            if phrase:
                parts.append(f"{phrase} {obj}")
            else:
                parts.append(f"{pred} {obj}")
        # Combine parts for this subject
        if len(parts) == 1:
            clause = f"{subject} {parts[0]}"
        else:
            clause = f"{subject} " + ", ".join(parts[:-1]) + ", and " + parts[-1]
        subject_clauses.append(clause)

    # Combine all subject clauses into one sentence
    if len(subject_clauses) == 1:
        sentence = subject_clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = "; ".join(subject_clauses[:-1]) + "; and " + subject_clauses[-1] + "."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
